---
title: "Hambee Makinoda" 
image: mypic.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 17em
  links:
  - icon: linkedin
    text: LinkedIn
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/
  - icon: github
    text: GitHub
    href: https://github.com/Hambanana0923
  - icon: email
    text: Email
    href: mailto:hambee@ucsb.edu
  - icon: instagram
    text: Instagram
    href: https://www.instagram.com/hambee_m/
---

My name is Hambee Makinoda (Pronounced "Han-bay"). I am third year Environmental Studies and Biological Sciences B.S. major at UCSB. My hobbies are being active and playing soccer, basketball, and volleyball.
